title: A CS Professor on Why Slow Learning Wins in the AI Era | CU Boulder, Tom Yeh
summary: Tom Yeh, a CS professor at CU Boulder, argues that teaching AI through manual, hand-calculated methods at human speed builds mathematical foundations that survive hype cycles better than learning the latest tools. He contends that focusing on fundamentals rather than AI-native approaches creates durable skills because people shape AI, not vice versa.
